regions.text: Chlorophyll makes plants green and is necessary for growth. Plants take what they need from air, earth, and water. They make carbohydrates from H2O and CO2.
This power of plants is named photosynthesis (putting together with light). Men and animals depend upon photosynthesis for food and energy.
We and the animals either eat plants or eat plant-eating animals or both. carbohydrate: material made by green plants from C, H, and O.
